query: Generate a robots.txt for our SaaS app at crmpro.com. We want to allow all search engines to crawl public pages but block /api/, /dashboard/, /admin/, and /auth/ paths. Also block GPTBot and CCBot entirely.
Our staging environment at staging.example.com is showing up in Google search results. I need a robots.txt that blocks all crawlers with Disallow: / for non-production environments.

Create a dynamic sitemap.xml in TanStack Start that includes all static pages and fetches blog posts from the database. Each URL needs loc, lastmod from the database updatedAt field, changefreq, and priority.
I want to allow ClaudeBot and GPTBot to crawl our /blog/ and /docs/ sections but block them from everything else. What user-agent strings do I need for Anthropic and OpenAI crawlers?
Google Search Console says our sitemap has errors. Some URLs return 404 and there are duplicate entries. How do I ensure the sitemap only contains canonical URLs that return HTTP 200?
Our site has over 80,000 product pages. I need a sitemap index that splits products into sub-sitemaps of 50,000 URLs each, plus separate sitemaps for blog posts and static pages.
Set up an image sitemap with image:loc, image:title, and image:caption for our portfolio pages. Google isn't discovering the images on our photography site.

Implement a TanStack Start API route at /robots.txt that returns environment-specific crawl rules. Production allows crawling, staging and dev return Disallow: /. Include the Sitemap directive pointing to our sitemap.xml.
AhrefsBot and SemrushBot are making thousands of requests per minute and slowing down our site. Add Disallow rules for these bots and also add Crawl-delay: 10 for other aggressive crawlers.
Generate a Cloudflare Worker that serves our sitemap.xml at the edge. It should read URL entries from KV storage and return well-formed XML with proper Content-Type headers and caching.
Add noindex meta tags to our admin pages so they don't appear in Google search results. The pages are behind authentication but some are leaking into the index.
Set up Google Search Console and submit our site for indexing. I need to verify ownership using a DNS TXT record and then request indexing of our new pages.
Implement canonical URL tags on all pages to prevent duplicate content issues. Our blog posts are accessible at both /blog/post-title and /posts/post-title.
Configure Cloudflare WAF to block bot traffic based on user-agent, IP reputation, and request rate. I need firewall rules, not robots.txt directives.
Add structured data JSON-LD for our local business pages. Include name, address, phone, opening hours, and aggregate rating for Google Knowledge Panel.
Our React SPA isn't being indexed by Google because the content is rendered client-side. I need to set up prerendering or SSR so Googlebot can see the page content.
Set up hreflang tags for our multilingual site so Google serves the correct language version in search results for Indonesian and English users.
Implement server-side rate limiting on our API endpoints. Too many requests from the same IP should return 429 Too Many Requests with a Retry-After header.
I need to set up redirects for our old URLs after a site migration. /old-about should 301 redirect to /about and /old-blog/* should redirect to /blog/*.
Create Open Graph meta tags for better social media sharing. When our links are shared on Facebook and LinkedIn, they should show the page title, description, and a 1200x630 preview image.
